name: ai-gateway
description: AI Gateway - 9Router-based multi-provider AI proxy with routing, failover, health monitoring, observability, and dashboard

scripts.start:all: npm install && cd health-engine && npm install && cd .. && cd routing-engine && npm install && cd .. && cd observability-engine && npm install && cd .. && start http://localhost:20128 && node server.js & node health-engine/server.js & node routing-engine/server.js & node observability-engine/server.js
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd health-engine && npm install && cd .. && cd routing-engine && npm install && cd .. && cd observability-engine && npm install
